positive: A vibrant, retro 80s synthwave illustration featuring a stylized sunset over a grid-patterned beach. Include silhouetted palm trees, a neon flying car, and a vaporwave aesthetic. Use highly saturated colors: magenta, cyan, and electric purple. Pop art style, vector illustration, clean edges, high contrast.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic, monochrome, faded colors
